summary: Iteration 41: Bug fixes verified for Applications tab field labels and Payment settings. All 6 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Applications tab shows human-readable field labels (e.g., 'Jméno a Příjmení' instead of 'field_1776161309549')
VERIFIED: Boolean values in applicant_data display as 'Ano'/'Ne' instead of 'true'/'false'
VERIFIED: Settings page shows 'Platební nastavení' menu item with PRO badge when events module is enabled
VERIFIED: Payment settings page loads saved data (account_number, bank_code, account_name)
VERIFIED: Payment settings can be saved and persisted via PUT /api/events/settings/payment
VERIFIED: Payment settings section visibility controlled by /api/events/check-access feature flag
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified. Applications tab now correctly maps field IDs to human-readable labels using fieldLabelMap built from formData.form_fields. Boolean values display as 'Ano'/'Ne'. Payment settings section in Settings page is visible only when events module is enabled (checked via /api/events/check-access). Two events exist with applications: 'Za uměním do Lázní' (2 applications) and 'Příměstský tábor Léto 2026' (4 applications).

verified_features.feature: Boolean values in applicant_data display as 'Ano'/'Ne'
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Souhlasím s podmínkami GDPR...: Ano' instead of 'true'

verified_features.evidence: Account number '1234567890', bank code '0100', account name 'Test Muzeum' loaded

Payment settings visibility controlled by events module feature flag
